patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because the 'mapping' field is null when there is no header in the CSV record. We need to check if 'mapping' is null before iterating over it.
patches.fixed_method:
<M extends Map<String, String>> M putIn(final M map) {
        if (mapping != null) {
            for (final Entry<String, Integer> entry : mapping.entrySet()) {
                final int col = entry.getValue().intValue();
                if (col < values.length) {
                    map.put(entry.getKey(), values[col]);
                }
            }
        }
        return map;
    }

patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because the 'mapping' field is null when there is no header in the CSVRecord. We need to handle the case where 'mapping' is null.
